evals.prompt:
I want to create a pairwise test matrix for a user profile settings feature.

Please use these factors and levels:

- Account type: Personal, Team, Enterprise
- Theme: Light, Dark, System
- Language: en, ja, fr
- Time zone: JST, PST, CET
- Notification frequency: Immediate, DailyDigest, WeeklyDigest
- Sign-in method: Password, SSO

Please organize the factors and levels clearly, create a reviewable PICT model, and provide candidate combinations.
evals.expected_output: State that the requested coverage strength is pairwise, organize the explicit factors and levels into a clear, reviewable PICT model, and provide deterministic pairwise candidate combinations generated with pict-cli. If pict-cli cannot run, return the reviewed model and clearly state that no combinations were generated.

evals.prompt:
I want to design pairwise combination tests for a login feature.
Here are the conditions I have in mind.

- OS: Windows 11, macOS 14, iOS 18, Android 15
- Browser/App: Chrome, Edge, Safari, Native App
- Authentication method: Password, SSO, Passkey
- Network: Wi-Fi, 4G, After offline recovery
- Language: ja, en

The constraints are:
- Safari is only available on macOS or iOS
- Edge is only available on Windows
- Passkey is supported only on Chrome, Safari, and the Native App
- After offline recovery applies only to the Native App

Using these conditions, first organize the factors / levels / constraints, then create a PICT model, and if possible, also provide candidate combinations. Please clearly point out any ambiguous areas.
evals.expected_output: State that the requested coverage strength is pairwise, extract factors, levels, and explicit constraints, present a reviewable PICT model, and provide deterministic pairwise candidate combinations generated with pict-cli while calling out any ambiguity. If pict-cli cannot run, return the reviewed model and clearly state that no combinations were generated.

evals.prompt:
I need 3-wise interaction coverage for a payment settings feature.

Please use these factors and levels:

- Country: JP, US, DE
- Currency: JPY, USD, EUR
- Payment method: CreditCard, PayPal, ApplePay, BankTransfer
- Membership type: Guest, Member, Premium
- Device: Desktop, iPhone, Android
- Tax calculation: Internal, External

The explicit constraints are:
- JP supports only JPY, US supports only USD, and DE supports only EUR
- ApplePay is available only on iPhone
- BankTransfer is not available for Guest users
- PayPal is not supported for Premium users
- External tax applies only to DE

Please build a reviewable PICT model and generate the combinations for the requested 3-wise coverage.
evals.expected_output: State that the requested coverage strength is 3-wise, organize the explicit factors, levels, and constraints into a reviewable PICT model, and provide deterministic 3-wise candidate combinations generated with pict-cli. If pict-cli cannot run or the required 3-wise option is unavailable, return the reviewed model and clearly state that no combinations were generated.
